mapper.select: /* miraeAssetMapper.getMspMiraeAssetIfList */ SELECT A.IF_YM , A.MA_KEY , A.CUST_NM , A.CI , A.INSR_FEE , A.INSR_JOIN_DT , A.INSR_NM , A.INSR_CD FROM MSP_MIRAE_ASSET_IF A WHERE A.IF_YM = #{ifYm} AND A.TRADE_CD = #{tradeCd}

/* miraeAssetMapper.getMspJuoCntrByInfo */ SELECT DECODE(MIN(A.CUSTOMER_ID), NULL, 0, 1) AS KTM_CUST_YN , MIN(B.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE) AS KTM_OPEN_DT , MIN(B.CONTRACT_NUM) AS KTM_CNTR_NO FROM MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE 1=1 AND A.SELF_CSTMR_CI = #{ci} AND A.CUSTOMER_ID = B.CUSTOMER_ID AND B.SUB_STATUS IN ('A' , 'S')
